marketplace.help: Generate browser-automation instructions for Impact marketplace discovery (no public API)
marketplace.usage_instructions: Generate browser-automation instructions for Impact marketplace flows. Impact's Publisher API has NO marketplace/discovery endpoint — every documented /Mediapartners/{AccountSID}/... endpoint is post-approval/operational. These commands return structured JSON that another agent (using the playwright-cli skill) can follow to drive the partner-portal browser UI. Default output is machine-parseable JSON; pass --text for a human-readable rendering. The JSON has a top-level 'disclaimer' field flagging the no-API constraint, plus 'target_url', 'auth_note', 'steps', 'extraction_target', 'constraints', 'success_criteria', and 'next_actions'. The auth_note directs the consumer to use the lastpass CLI for app.impact.com credentials before driving the browser session — credentials are never embedded in the instruction.

apply.help: Emit playwright-cli instructions to apply to a specific Impact program.
apply.usage_instructions: Emit playwright-cli instructions to apply to a specific Impact program identified by PROGRAM_ID (the Impact campaign id, e.g. '394' for Shoebacca). The marketplace SPA has NO per-program deep link — the apply flow is inline. The agent receiving the JSON should: (1) ensure an authenticated playwright-cli session, (2) navigate to the marketplace landing page (target_url), (3) click 'All Brands', (4) locate the `.brands-card` whose logo URL contains `display-logo-via-campaign/<PROGRAM_ID>.gif` (scrolling or narrowing by brand-name search since the grid is virtualised), (5) click the inline 'Apply' button on that card to open the application drawer, (6) snapshot the form, (7) fill required fields from the partner's stored profile data, (8) submit, (9) capture confirmation text. Pass --text for human-readable output.

arguments.name: program_id
arguments.help: Impact program identifier discovered via `marketplace search`

options.name: --text
options.help: Emit a human-readable plain-text rendering instead of the default machine-parseable JSON

list-categories.help: Emit playwright-cli instructions to harvest Impact marketplace category labels.
list-categories.usage_instructions: Emit playwright-cli instructions to harvest the Impact marketplace category labels. The agent should: (1) navigate to the marketplace landing page, (2) click 'All Brands' (the default 'Home' tab hides or partials the Categories filter), (3) click the 'Categories' filter chip above the result grid to open its dropdown, (4) read every category label inside the expanded dropdown exactly as displayed (the dropdown is virtualised — scroll inside it until no new labels appear). Pass --text for human-readable output.

options.name: --text
options.help: Emit a human-readable plain-text rendering instead of the default machine-parseable JSON

search.help: Emit playwright-cli instructions to discover Impact marketplace programs.
search.usage_instructions: Emit playwright-cli instructions to discover Impact marketplace programs. Optional --keyword and --category narrow the search; the keyword is embedded in the marketplace SPA's URL fragment (#joinState=all&q=...) so the agent can navigate directly. The agent receiving the JSON should: (1) ensure an authenticated playwright-cli session for app.impact.com (use lastpass for credentials), (2) navigate to target_url (the new Brand Marketplace SPA at /secure/mediapartner/marketplace/new-campaign-marketplace-flow.ihtml — the legacy /secure/marketplace/brand-listings.ihtml path returns 404), (3) click the 'All Brands' tab (the default 'Home' tab is curated/limited), (4) snapshot the page, (5) apply keyword/category filters if not already in URL, (6) harvest one record per `.brands-card` element with fields: program_name, advertiser, category, terms_summary, program_id (parsed from `display-logo-via-campaign/<id>.gif` in the card's logo URL), join_state. The grid is virtualised — scroll to load more rows. Pass --text for human-readable output.

options.name: --keyword
options.help: Optional search keyword to type into the marketplace search box

options.name: --category
options.help: Optional category label to apply as a filter

options.name: --text
options.help: Emit a human-readable plain-text rendering instead of the default machine-parseable JSON

usage_instructions: Use the impact CLI for Impact.com Publisher API work: account data, programs, ads, actions, catalogs, reports, clicks, jobs, and websites. Commands follow `impact <group> <action>`; list-style commands support --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --properties/-p, and --table/-t when shown in help. Use `impact auth login` before API calls and prefer JSON output for scripting. The marketplace group is special: Impact has no public discovery API, so those commands emit structured JSON instructions for browser automation via playwright-cli.
